name: Almond Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar until light.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition. Continue beating until very light and fluffy.
3. Mix flour, baking powder, salt, and anise seed together. Blend into the creamed mixture.
4. Stir in nuts.
5. Divide dough into fourths. Grease two cookie sheets.
6. Form dough into 2 loaves, approximately 1 1/2 inches wide and the length of each baking sheet.
7. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes.
8. Remove from oven and cut loaf diagonally into 3/4-inch slices.
9. Place cut side down on cookie sheets. Brush with milk and sprinkle with granulated sugar.
10. Return to oven, bake at 375°F for an additional 10 minutes, or until toasted and crispy.
Variation:
- Omit anise seeds. Add 1 teaspoon vanilla and toast almonds to a golden brown before adding to dough. Follow the above directions for baking loaves. After cutting diagonally, return to oven for an additional 10 minutes until golden brown.
Variation:
- Omit anise seeds. Add 1 1/2 teaspoons vanilla, 1 teaspoon lemon zest, and 1 teaspoon orange zest.
- When baked, slice each loaf diagonally and return to the oven for 5 to 10 minutes to brown.
